title: Lexus Secret Service Menu, Navigation System Diagnostic Check Mode, Fault Code Read Clear
description: Access the navigation system service and diagnostic mode on a 2010 Lexus RX 450h, including system checks, fault code reading, and memory clear functions.
tips: The diagnostic mode can be entered using two different methods: the display button with remote touch controller, or the menu button combined with the headlight switch.
To exit diagnostic mode, simply turn the ignition off.
After completing a repair, use the memory clear function to clear navigation and subsystem codes, then recheck to confirm the repair was successful.
The hard drive integrity check takes approximately 30 seconds.
Fault codes can be viewed by subsystem — amplifier, audio, remote touch, etc. — by clicking on the individual boxes in the failure diagnosis screen.
Newer Lexus models may require a different procedure to enter diagnostic mode.
